二

五
六

Li Xin (李信)

The Broken Hero

Origins 起源

Once a loyal and brilliant general of the Qin army, Li Xin fought alongside the legendary Ying Zheng. Known for his unmatched swordsmanship and deep loyalty, he was the empire's rising military prodigy. At this moment, Li Xin was the absolute embodiment of order, duty, and honor.

The Fall 陨落

Pride precedes the fall. Underestimating his enemy, Li Xin led his troops into an absolute disaster. Thousands perished under his command. Instead of a glorious death, he survived—shattering his confidence and cursing him with unbearable guilt. The seeds of self-hatred were planted.

Corruption 腐化

To regain his strength and seek an impossible redemption, Li Xin embraced a forbidden, dark force. This choice shattered his humanity, splitting his mind and body between the fading light of his past and the all-consuming darkness of his rage.

Shadow Form 暗形态

Fueled by anger and regret. Prioritizes raw destruction over control. Will annihilate anything in its path.

🌑

Radiant Form 光形态

Represents his former self. Fights with control, purpose, and discipline. Seeks redemption.

🌞

Legacy & King 秦始皇

A general broken, a king betrayed. Li Xin's connection to Ying Zheng remains his greatest burden. While the Emperor represents absolute order and ruthless ambition, Li Xin stands as the living, tragic cost of that very ambition. Can a weapon of darkness ever truly serve the light again?

"He fights not just enemies—but himself."
